t.t-if: request.env.user.vendor_portal is True and (not picking.vendor_delivery_status or picking.vendor_delivery_status == 'pending')

t.div: Please select at least one delivery.
Some selected deliveries are already validated.

div.t-att-class: picking.customer_tracking_status in ['In Transit','Delivered'] and 'o_tracking_step active' or 'o_tracking_step'
